data.title: Vitalik Cuts Spending to Rebuild Ethereum’s Core Vision
data.description:
Ethereum (ETH)’s founder is tightening the reins. Vitalik Buterin says the Ethereum Foundation (EF) is entering a period of “mild austerity,” even as it pushes an aggressive technical roadmap.
source: https://techgaged.com/vitalik-cuts-spending-to-rebuild-ethereums-core-vision/

data.title: El Salvador Buys Gold Again, and It Says More About the System Than Bitcoin Ever Could
data.description:
"El Salvador has made headlines once again by purchasing gold, a move that signifies deeper implications about the nation's financial system and economic strategy than what Bitcoin could ever represent. This decision highlights the government's approach to diversifying its assets and managing its monetary policy, reflecting a desire for stability in a world of fluctuating digital currencies. While Bitcoin has been lauded as a revolutionary form of digital money and investment, El Salvador's renewed commitment to gold underscores the enduring value of tangible assets and traditional investing in a country navigating the complexities of its financial future."
source: https://blocknews.com/el-salvador-buys-gold-again-and-it-says-more-about-the-system-than-bitcoin-ever-could/

data.title: Banks battle for tech startups as AI boom creates new gold rush
data.description:
Three years after several major lenders serving technology companies collapsed, big banks are fighting hard to capture their business. The surge in artificial intelligence investments is turning up the heat on this battle. Venture funding for AI hit an all-time high of $222 billion last year, according to PitchBook. This money has created numerous millionaires […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/banks-battle-for-tech-startups-as-ai-boom-creates-new-gold-rush/

data.title: Shift in Asset Storage Strategy: From Bitcoin to Gold
data.description: The cryptocurrency industry has traditionally relied on secure Swiss vaults for storing Bitcoin. According to NS3.AI, a notable firm has recently shifted its focus, opting to store gold in these vaults instead. This transition highlights a change in custodial strategies within the crypto sector, underscoring the importance of asset diversification and enhanced security measures.

data.title: GameStop's Strategic Shift Towards $100 Billion Valuation
data.description: GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen is steering the company towards a $100 billion valuation through a significant acquisition. According to NS3.AI, Cohen has increased his ownership stake to over 9% and is motivated by a revised compensation package linked to substantial market and profit targets. Following this announcement, GameStop's stock experienced a 4% increase, adding to its gains for the year.

data.title: Bitcoin Transfer from Cumberland DRW to Anonymous Address
data.description: A transfer of 171.7 BTC was recorded at 02:54. According to ChainCatcher, the Bitcoin, valued at approximately $3.92 million, was moved from Cumberland DRW to an anonymous address starting with bc1qcy.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 84,000 USDT with a 0.77% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 30, 2026, 18:59 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 84,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 84,160 USDT, with a narrowed 0.77% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Dave Portnoy Increases Investment in XRP and Bitcoin Amid Market Fluctuations
data.description: Dave Portnoy, founder of Barstool Sports, has made a significant investment in cryptocurrencies, purchasing an additional $1 million worth of XRP and $500,000 worth of Bitcoin. According to NS3.AI, Portnoy cited Warren Buffett's renowned investment strategy of buying during market downturns as a guiding principle for his decision. This action indicates a growing confidence in these digital assets despite recent market volatility.

data.title: Silver Market Experiences Significant Fluctuations
data.description:
The founder of Equation News, Vida, has announced his decision to invest in silver. According to ChainCatcher, Vida stated that the current situation in the silver market resembles the events of October 11, prompting him to see if he has acquired undervalued assets. He also noted his lack of familiarity with the precious metals market.

ChainCatcher advises caution due to significant fluctuations in the precious metals market in recent hours, highlighting the associated risks.

data.title: DeFi Security Developments Highlight Mixed Outcomes Amid Market Uncertainty
data.description: Recent developments in decentralized finance (DeFi) security have shown a blend of successful hack recoveries and persistent vulnerabilities. According to NS3.AI, prominent firms are under fire for security shortcomings, while new funding commitments are being made to bolster Ethereum's infrastructure. Additionally, major cryptocurrency exchanges remain under scrutiny as market uncertainty continues in the wake of significant crashes.

data.title: Crypto Futures Market Experiences Significant Liquidations Amid Volatility
data.description: In the past hour, major exchanges have witnessed futures liquidations amounting to $108 million. According to NS3.AI, the past 24 hours have seen a surge in liquidations, reaching a total of $1.42 billion. This substantial activity highlights the increased volatility currently affecting the crypto futures market.

data.title: Analyst Predicts End of Precious Metals Boom
data.description:
The era of unprecedented growth in precious metals may have concluded, according to ChainCatcher. Analyst Adam Button from investinglive suggests that the market for precious metals has reached its peak.

Button expressed skepticism about gold prices falling below $4,000, noting that if such a drop occurs, it might attract well-capitalized investors. However, he advises caution and refrains from making bold predictions at this time. For current holders of gold, the situation presents a challenging decision, as market conditions could either improve rapidly or experience significant volatility. Button warns against making panic-driven decisions during late Friday trading sessions.

Regarding the possibility of a further sell-off akin to "Black Monday," Button believes it is unlikely unless triggered by factors beyond the Iranian agreement.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Mester Anticipates Economic Growth Above Trend Level
data.description: The Federal Reserve's Mester forecasts that the economy will continue to grow at a rate above the trend level, driven by credit conditions and fiscal policy. According to ChainCatcher, this outlook suggests sustained economic momentum influenced by these factors.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Mussailem Predicts Inflation Trends
data.description: Federal Reserve official Mussailem has projected that inflation will decrease to around 2%. According to Jin10, Mussailem also expressed concerns that inflation might remain above 2% for an extended period. He cautioned that further interest rate cuts could exacerbate inflation expectations.
